name: D.Gallerie
suggested_pitch: Adding a consultation form and visible phone number could convert more premium traffic.
message_email:
Subject: Quick wins for dgallerie.sa

Hi,

I came across D.Gallerie while researching premium furniture showrooms in Riyadh. Your site stands out — the interior photography and overall aesthetic are genuinely high-end.

Two areas that could help capture more leads: there's no consultation booking form for visitors who want design services, and your phone number isn't visible without digging into the contact page. Given the premium audience you attract, a short booking form and a header phone number could turn more browsers into consultations.

Would you be open to a free 15-minute walkthrough?

Best regards
message_whatsapp: Hi — I looked at dgallerie.sa and the design is genuinely premium. Two quick things: there's no consultation booking form on the homepage, and the phone number isn't in the header. Both small additions could convert more of your high-end traffic. Happy to share specifics.

name: Dezign District
suggested_pitch: A chat widget and a product-focused CTA would complement your premium visual design.
message_email:
Subject: Quick wins for dezigndistrict.com.sa

Hi,

I came across Dezign District while researching furniture showrooms in Riyadh. Your website photography is exceptional — the Saga Sofa launch page in particular looks world-class.

Two things I noticed that could help capture more visitor interest: there's no chat widget for visitors who want to ask a quick question, and the main homepage CTA is "About Us" rather than something product-focused like "Explore Collections" or "Book a Showroom Visit."

A live chat and a stronger CTA could turn more of your premium traffic into showroom appointments.

Would a free 15-minute walkthrough be helpful?

Best regards
message_whatsapp: Hi — I checked out dezigndistrict.com.sa and the visual design is outstanding. Two quick observations: there's no chat widget for quick questions, and the main CTA leads to About Us instead of products. A chat tool and a product-focused CTA could convert more visitors. Happy to walk through it.

name: Midas Furniture
suggested_pitch: A clearer CTA and a visible contact form would convert more of your well-targeted traffic.
message_email:
Subject: Quick wins for midasfurniture.com

Hi,

I came across Midas Furniture while looking at furniture stores in Riyadh. Your "Special Prices" section and room-set photography are well done, and having both chat and WhatsApp available is a strong advantage.

Two areas that could help: the "Try Midas AI" CTA may confuse furniture shoppers who just want to browse or buy, and there's no contact or enquiry form on the homepage for visitors who prefer to leave a message.

A clearer shopping CTA and a simple enquiry form could help convert more visitors.

Would you be open to a free 15-minute walkthrough?

Best regards
message_whatsapp: Hi — I looked at midasfurniture.com and your chat + WhatsApp setup is strong. Two things: the "Try Midas AI" CTA may confuse shoppers, and there's no enquiry form on the homepage. A clearer CTA and a contact form could boost conversions. Happy to share specifics.
